_comment: ScarForge — Batch Tile Generation Template. Modify the positive prompt for different building types.

prompts.tavern: pixel, pixel art, top-down view, dark fantasy medieval tavern, stone walls, wooden beams, warm firelight glow from windows, hanging sign, cobblestone, gritty atmosphere, muted dark palette, 32x32 tile sprite, game asset, detailed shading, no anti-aliasing, clean pixel edges
prompts.blacksmith: pixel, pixel art, top-down view, dark fantasy medieval blacksmith forge, anvil visible through doorway, smoke rising from chimney, iron fixtures, dark stone walls, orange ember glow, gritty atmosphere, muted dark palette, 32x32 tile sprite, game asset, detailed shading, no anti-aliasing, clean pixel edges
prompts.chapel: pixel, pixel art, top-down view, dark fantasy medieval ruined chapel, cracked stained glass, overgrown with vines, eerie pale light, crumbling stone walls, moss covered, gritty atmosphere, muted dark palette, 32x32 tile sprite, game asset, detailed shading, no anti-aliasing, clean pixel edges
prompts.market_stall: pixel, pixel art, top-down view, dark fantasy medieval market stall, wooden canopy, hanging meats and herbs, crates and barrels, muddy ground, dim lantern, gritty atmosphere, muted dark palette, 32x32 tile sprite, game asset, detailed shading, no anti-aliasing, clean pixel edges
prompts.watchtower: pixel, pixel art, top-down view, dark fantasy medieval watchtower, tall stone structure, narrow arrow slits, torch at top, weathered walls, gritty atmosphere, muted dark palette, 32x32 tile sprite, game asset, detailed shading, no anti-aliasing, clean pixel edges
prompts.well: pixel, pixel art, top-down view, dark fantasy medieval stone well, wooden bucket and rope, mossy stones, dark water below, cobblestone surround, gritty atmosphere, muted dark palette, 32x32 tile sprite, game asset, detailed shading, no anti-aliasing, clean pixel edges
prompts.graveyard: pixel, pixel art, top-down view, dark fantasy medieval graveyard, crooked tombstones, dead tree, iron fence, foggy ground, eerie green glow, gritty atmosphere, muted dark palette, 32x32 tile sprite, game asset, detailed shading, no anti-aliasing, clean pixel edges
prompts.dungeon_entrance: pixel, pixel art, top-down view, dark fantasy dungeon entrance, stone archway, iron gate, skull carvings, descending stairs into darkness, flickering torches, gritty atmosphere, muted dark palette, 32x32 tile sprite, game asset, detailed shading, no anti-aliasing, clean pixel edges

negative: blurry, smooth gradients, anti-aliasing, 3d render, realistic, photographic, modern, futuristic, sci-fi, bright colors, neon, watermark, text, signature, jpeg artifacts, low quality, deformed, ugly, oversaturated, bloom, glow effects
